summary: Log messages hardcode 'Request 0' instead of a real request identifier, making log correlation impossible in multi-request scenarios.
The orchestrator's list-to-singleton unwrap path may be dead code if all bridges now return dicts; confirm and remove if unused.
Consider adding a debug assertion to ensure source_outputs[0] is present and has expected attributes, to fail fast if the invariant is violated.
The ar2diffusion docstring should note that the bridge avoids importing transformers/tokenizers, as it is a hot-path invariant.
